subheading.text: A place to discover events, visit spots, learn about the culture and contribute to the community. Made in Sarajevo <3

register.title: Welcome to SpotlightSarajevo!
register.sectionDescription: Where all events, spots and iconic moments are collected together! Please register Your account to use the Application
register.categorySectionDescription: Now, to better enhance Your experience, tell us which spots You like to visit the most. Select three categories that match Your vibe.
register.categorySectionEventsDescription: Lovely choices! Now, it's time to do the same for events. Select three categories that match Your vibe.
register.surveyDescription: We're almost done! Before finishing, please answer just a couple of questions for us to better uderstand who the users of our application are!
register.finalDescription: Countless events and spots are waiting to be discovered! We wish You the best experience @ SpotlightSarajevo!

homepage.headerSubtitle: An overview of recent happenings, Your favourites and headline events!
homepage.noEventsOnDateDescription: There are no events scheduled for the selected date. Try selecting a different day!

discover.headerSubtitle: Discover the most popular spots & upcoming events!
discover.popularTitle: These are the top rated & popular spots in Sarajevo

spotReview.accessibilityDesc: How easy is it to get to the location? Distance, transport?
spotReview.affordabilityDesc: What is the price-range of the spot? A lower rating indicated bigger prices
spotReview.staffKindnessDesc: How easy is it to get to the location? Distance, transport?
spotReview.atmosphereDesc: What is the price-range of the spot? A lower rating indicated bigger prices
spotReview.localeQualityDesc: How easy is it to get to the location? Distance, transport?
spotReview.cleanlinessDesc: What is the price-range of the spot? A lower rating indicated bigger prices
spotReview.ratingDesc: Your final overall rating of the spot, including all of the above mentioned statistics and Your own personal experiences (This carries the most weight in calculating the Spot review).
spotReview.deleteConfirm: Are You sure You want to delete Your current review for this Spot?

eventOverview.locationTitle: Location of this event on the map
eventOverview.reviewsTitle: What other users say about this organiser
eventOverview.eventInfoAgeYes: You have to be at least the required age to enter this event:
eventOverview.eventInfoAgeNo: There is no age limit for this event. Everyone is welcome!
eventOverview.eventInfoReservationYes: You have to reserve a spot to enter this event. Contant the organisers.
eventOverview.eventInfoReservationNo: There is no reservation required for this event. Come as You are!
eventOverview.eventInfoPriceYes: This events lowest entry price ticket is:
eventOverview.eventInfoPriceNo: This event is free and carries to entry cost.
eventOverview.eventInfoCancelYes: The organisers offer refunds for lat cancellations. Contact them for more info!
eventOverview.eventInfoCancelNo: The organisers do NOT offer refunds for late cancellations.
eventOverview.eventInfoLangYes: The predominant language of this event is:
eventOverview.eventInfoLangNo: There is no predominant langauge for this event. A multilingual atmosphere is welcome!
eventOverview.organiserCategory: Predominantly makinng events in this category:
eventOverview.noAuthOrganiserReviewHeader: Log in to leave reviews and see your reviews!
eventOverview.noAuthOrganiserReviewSubheading: It's only a quick step! Create an account if you don't have one already!
eventOverview.noUserOrganiserReviewSubheading: Leave a review if you have attended this organiser's events. It helps them and other users of SpotlightSarajevo.
eventOverview.noOtherOrganiserReviewHeading: No other users have left reviews for this organiser yet!
eventOverview.noOtherOrganiserReviewSubheading: Seems empty and lonely. Leave a review and become the first!

eventReview.atmosphereDesc: What was the atmosphere of the event? Lively, good, welcome, warm? A higher rating indicates better feeling!
eventReview.enjoyabilityDesc: How enjoyabel was the event for its purpose? Did You have a good time with the organisation and activities?
eventReview.qualityDesc: What was the quality of the organisation? Infrastructure, time-value, staff, performance?
eventReview.ratingDesc: Your final overall rating of the organiser, including all of the above mentioned statistics and Your own personal experiences (This carries the most weight in calculating the Organiser review).
eventReview.deleteConfirm: Are You sure You want to delete Your current review for this Organiser?

notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved. Don't worry, you can navigate back to the homepage.
notFound.helpText: If you believe this is an error, please report it to us or try navigating using the menu.

profile.headerSubtitle: View and manage your personal information and settings.
profile.statsSectionTitle: Statistical overview of your activities in Sarajevo
profile.communityRequestsSectionParagraphOne: Here you can submit requests to add new locations or events that are not currently in the SpotlightSarajevo system. Your requests help us keep our database current and relevant for all users.
profile.communityRequestsSectionParagraphTwo: If you know of a location or event that is not currently in the system, feel free to submit a report using our form, and our administrators will review your request as quickly as possible. The more locations and events in the system, the better for the entire city!
profile.premiumAccountSectionTitle: Become a premium member of SpotlightSarajevo!
profile.premiumAccountSectionParagraphOne: SpotlightSarajevo services are designed to provide a quick and easy guide through Sarajevo for all its residents and tourists. We value every individual who chooses to use our application and understand that each person has their own vision of the application's functionality.
profile.premiumAccountSectionParagraphTwo: Nevertheless, our developers always work hard to improve the application and populate the system as needed. That is why every part of the financial benefit the application generates is vitally important to us.
profile.premiumAccountSectionParagraphThree: We understand that paying for online services is not for everyone, so for people who choose to do so, we have added bonus features to the application to further enhance your experience. Become a monthly premium member of SpotlightSarajevo and enjoy additional benefits!
profile.premiumBenefitTwo: Dedicated Map Search for locations and events
profile.premiumStatusInfo: You are currently a premium member! Thank you for supporting SpotlightSarajevo! Your benefits include:

premiumBenefits.title: Upgrade to Premium!
premiumBenefits.subtitle: You've tried to access a premium feature. Upgrade your account to unlock exclusive features and enhance your SpotlightSarajevo experience!
premiumBenefits.benefitOne: Full Map View - Browse all spots on an interactive map
premiumBenefits.benefitTwo: Event Calendar - View all upcoming events in calendar format
premiumBenefits.benefitThree: Proximity Search - Find spots nearest to your location
premiumBenefits.benefitFour: Ad-Free Experience - Enjoy the app without interruptions
